utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hi ! I am so glad you are here , but it is gonna be a while . I ... I wished you would called first .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: Oh that is all right , I am coming back later with your father .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I am coming back later with your father .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: I actually needed to talk to you before the birth .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: I brought something that I want to give you , assuming of course that you want it .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ma , you are asking me to marry you ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_you are asking me to marry you ?

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: This is your grandmother engagement ring , I want you to give it to Rachel .

emotion_cause.span: 8_This is your grandmother engagement ring , I want you to give it to Rachel .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Mom no , come on ! Thank you .

emotion_cause.span: 8_This is your grandmother engagement ring , I want you to give it to Rachel .
